name: Chocolate Oatrage Snack Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Oatmeal, quick -OR- Old fashioned, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, oats, flour, brown sugar, eggs, walnuts, and vanilla. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed or until the mixture is light and fluffy.
2. Stir in 1 cup of chocolate chips. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square microwave-safe baking dish and cover with wax paper.
3. Cook on HIGH power for 4 minutes. Rotate the dish 1/4 turn, then cook for another 4-5 minutes or until the top of the cake appears dry and the bottom is evenly colored.
4. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup chocolate chips over the warm cake. Let stand for 10 minutes, then spread the chocolate evenly over the cake.
5. Cool on a counter top before cutting into serving pieces.
